_meta.note: All weapon classnames are CfgWeapons entries; all magazine classnames are CfgMagazines entries. Verified against config reference dumps. ACR DLC classes (L159_ACR, Mi24_D_CZ_ACR) are absent from the dump and flagged.

airframes.name: A-10 Thunderbolt II
airframes.notes: A10_US_EP1 inherits same config. BalanceInit strips all weapons except GAU8 until LF unlocks.

presets.name: OIF CAS Standard
presets.why: Iraq 2003-2010, 23rd FW mixed-ordnance CAS sortie: gun + 2x Maverick + 4x GBU-12 (approx Mk.82) + FFAR pod + AIM-9
approximations: GBU-12 used for Mk.82 slot (real mixed; A2 only has GBU)

presets.name: OEF Tank-Plinking
presets.why: Afghanistan 2001-2014, dedicated anti-armor: 4x AGM-65G Maverick + GBU-12 for bunkers (A2 capped at 2 Maverick)
approximations: A2 MaverickLauncher limited to 2Rnd_Maverick_A10; real loadout carried 4x AGM-65G

presets.name: Gun Run / TIC
presets.why: Troops in contact — gun is primary, FFAR for suppression while setting up strafing pass

presets.name: Sandy CSAR Escort
presets.why: Search and rescue escort role: Sidewinder for CAP, Maverick + gun for ground threat suppression

airframes.name: AV-8B Harrier II (LGB)
airframes.notes: GBU-12 variant. AV8B2 is Mk82+FFAR variant. BalanceInit strips BombLauncher (LF-gated).

presets.name: USMC MEU CAS Standard
presets.why: USMC MEU CAS deployments 2003-2012: GAU-12 + LGBs + FFAR + AIM-9. AGM-65E approximated by GBU-12.
approximations: GBU-12 approximates AGM-65E Maverick (laser); no Maverick class on Harrier in A2

presets.name: Precision Strike
presets.why: Deliberate hardened-target strike: max LGBs, no rockets for weight

presets.name: DAS Unguided
presets.why: AV-8B+ with Mk82 dumb bombs for area target (AV8B2 config): 6x Mk82 + FFAR + AIM-9

airframes.name: AV-8B Harrier II+
airframes.notes: Mk82 + FFAR variant of Harrier. Shares pool with AV8B.

presets.name: Precision Strike
presets.why: Standard STOVL stealth-equiv loadout: GBU-12 approximates internal JDAM; AIM-9 for self-defence
approximations: GBU-12 approximates GBU-31 JDAM (real F-35B internal); A2 has no JDAM

presets.name: Beast Mode CAS
presets.why: F-35B full external load sacrificing stealth: max GBU-12 + AIM-9
approximations: Only 2x GBU-12 available in A2 F35B mag; real beast mode carries 6+ bombs

airframes.name: Su-25 Frogfoot
airframes.notes: All Su-25 variants share Su25_base config. BalanceInit strips R73 and S8 from Su25_Ins; strips bombs+rockets from Su25_TK_EP1 at low LF.

presets.name: Afghanistan '85
presets.why: 40th Army VVS 1985, Bagram/Shindand: primary weapon S-8 80mm rockets + FAB-250; ATGMs rarely used vs Mujahideen
approximations: 4Rnd_FAB_250 slightly generous; real was 2x FAB-250 per sortie. R-60 self-defence absent (A2 R-60 classname unverified).

presets.name: Anti-Armor Strike
presets.why: Cold War NATO-contingency doctrine; Kh-25ML (AS-10) has no A2 equivalent — FAB-250 substitutes as unguided approximation
approximations: Kh-25ML (AS-10 Karen) absent in A2. FAB-250 is a poor substitute — unguided. R-73 used in place of R-60 (upgrade).

presets.name: CAS Light
presets.why: Chechnya-era light CAS patrol: gun emphasis, minimal bomb load

presets.name: S-5 Area Suppression
presets.why: Afghanistan pre-S-8 era: UB-32 S-5 57mm pods for massed area suppression of infantry in open ground

airframes.name: Su-39 (Su-25TM)
airframes.notes: Adds Ch29Launcher over Su-25 base. Vikhr ATGM (real Su-39 signature weapon) has no A2 equivalent.

presets.name: Anti-Tank Specialist
presets.why: Su-25TM primary mission: Kh-29T TV-guided ATGMs + S-8 suppression. Real Vikhr absent in A2; Ch29Launcher is best available substitute.
approximations: Vikhr ATGM (AT-16, 12km range) has no A2 classname. Ch29Launcher/4Rnd_Ch29 is the closest guided anti-tank weapon in A2.

presets.name: Strike + Self-Defence
presets.why: Mixed anti-ground + AAM self-protection; Kh-29 + FAB-250 + R-73

airframes.name: Su-34 Fullback
airframes.notes: 2-seat: pilot fires rockets+flares; gunner controls cannon+Kh-29+R-73. Turret split is fixed in A2 config.

presets.name: Syria 2015 Precision Strike
presets.why: Documented Syrian campaign loads: Kh-29T precision + GSh-30 + R-73 AAM (pilot flies rockets; gunner controls precision weapons)
approximations: R-77 BVR has no A2 equivalent; R-73 substitutes as WVR-only AAM

presets.name: Deep Strike
presets.why: Long-range interdiction: maximum Kh-29 + GSh-30; omit AAM for more strike capacity

presets.name: Escort / Air Superiority
presets.why: Su-34 escort role: max R-73 + gun. Real aircraft carries R-77 BVR; A2 approximates with R-73 WVR only.
approximations: R-77 (AMRAAM-equiv) absent in A2 vanilla. R73Launcher / 4Rnd_R73 is WVR-only substitute.

presets.name: Armed Trainer Strike
presets.why: L-39ZA config as used by Iraq, Syria, African operators: GSh-23L + S-5 57mm rockets + FAB bombs (light CAS)
approximations: 57mmLauncher 64-rd approximates 2x UB-16 S-5 pods (32rds each). FAB-100 absent in A2; FAB-250 used instead.

presets.name: COIN Patrol
presets.why: Light patrol loadout: all rockets for volume, no bombs; counterinsurgency/patrol sortie

airframes.name: AH-1Z Viper
airframes.notes: M197 + Hellfire + Sidewinder in gunner turret. Pilot has FFAR pods. BalanceInit strips Sidewinder at low LF.

presets.name: Anti-Armor Heavy
presets.why: USMC deliberate anti-armor mission: full Hellfire load + 20mm gun + AIM-9 self-defence

presets.name: OEF CAS Rockets
presets.why: Afghanistan: volume of fire over precision; rockets dominate; most common actual USMC Viper usage in OEF
approximations: 38Rnd_FFAR approximates 2x LAU-61 pods (19rds each = 38 — exact match!)

presets.name: Mixed Strike
presets.why: Balanced MEU escort: Hellfires for vehicles, rockets for suppression; standard USMC deployed loadout

presets.name: Air Alert
presets.why: Anti-helicopter escort: AIM-9 Sidewinder + M197 only; rare but documented configuration

airframes.name: AH-64D Apache Longbow
airframes.notes: M230 + Hellfire in gunner turret. Pilot has FFAR + flares. BalanceInit strips Hellfire at low LF.

presets.name: OIF 2003 Tank Plinking
presets.why: 101st Airborne Aviation deep attack Iraq 2003: 8-16x AGM-114K Hellfire was standard; A2 cap is 8
approximations: A2 HellfireLauncher carries 8Rnd_Hellfire; real Apache max is 16x Hellfire on 4 rails

presets.name: Urban CAS
presets.why: Iraq/Afghanistan mixed: Hellfires for point targets, Hydra 14-rd for suppression, gun always ready

presets.name: Escort / Force Protection
presets.why: Convoy escort and force protection: Hellfires + gun; AIM-92 Stinger (ATAS) absent in A2
approximations: AIM-92 Stinger ATAS not in A2. SidewinderLaucher_AH64 / 8Rnd_Sidewinder_AH64 substitutes if available.

airframes.name: Mi-24D Hind-D
airframes.notes: Mi24_D_CZ_ACR is ACR DLC — not in config dump. YakB + AT-2 Falanga in gunner turret. Pilot has S-5 rockets.

presets.name: Afghanistan Soviet '80
presets.why: 40th Army Mi-24D 1980-85: primarily S-5 57mm rockets + YakB; AT-2 Falanga rarely used vs Mujahideen
approximations: 128Rnd_57mm is generous vs real 2x UB-32 (64rds); AT-2 retained for authenticity but rarely selected.

presets.name: Warsaw Pact Anti-Armor
presets.why: Cold War contingency doctrine: AT-2 Falanga ATGM + YakB + S-5 rockets for attacking tank columns

presets.name: Assault Escort
presets.why: Balanced: ATGMs for vehicles, rockets for suppression of infantry; classic combined-arms escort role

airframes.name: Mi-24P Hind-F
airframes.notes: Fixed GSh-30-2 twin cannon (no turret rotation). AT-9 Ataka on turret. BalanceInit upgrades at LF3: strips bombs+80mm, adds 57mm+extra GSh ammo.

presets.name: Heavy Gunship
presets.why: Mi-24P primary role: fixed GSh-30-2 strafing + Ataka-V ATGM + S-8 rockets

presets.name: Anti-Armor Specialist
presets.why: Maximum ATGMs: Ataka + FAB-250 bombs for fortification busting; gun always available

presets.name: Fire Support
presets.why: Pure fire support: rockets + gun, no ATGMs — faster rearming cycle, area suppression emphasis

airframes.name: Mi-24V Hind-E
airframes.notes: YakB turret + AT-6 Spiral. Upgraded from D: better ATGM. BalanceInit strips AT6Launcher at low LF.

presets.name: Afghanistan '86 Upgraded
presets.why: Mi-24V replaced D in Afghanistan 1986; AT-6 Spiral vs Falanga; same rocket-dominant doctrine

presets.name: Rocket Emphasis
presets.why: Heavy S-8 rocket load for area suppression; common in Chechnya 1994-96

presets.name: Anti-Armor Pure
presets.why: Maximum ATGMs: 4x AT-6 Spiral + YakB for tank hunting; minimal rocket weight

airframes.name: Ka-52 Alligator
airframes.notes: 2A42 30mm dual-belt (HE+AP) in gunner turret. Vikhr ATGM is signature weapon. BalanceInit strips VikhrLauncher at low LF.

presets.name: Anti-Armor Primary
presets.why: Ka-52 designed role: 12x Vikhr-M ATGM (AT-16) + 30mm dual-belt cannon; accurately representable in A2

presets.name: Fire Support
presets.why: CAS support: S-8 rockets + 2A42 cannon for volume fire; Syria 2022 pattern

presets.name: Mixed Strike
presets.why: Vikhr ATGMs + S-8 rockets + 30mm; Syria 2022 documented usage combining precision and area fire

airframes.name: UH-1Y Venom
airframes.notes: Light attack/escort. M240 door guns are always-on turrets. BalanceInit upgrades FFAR from 14 to 4x14 pods at higher LF.

presets.name: USMC Fire Support Escort
presets.why: Typical USMC MEU/MAG-26 escort loadout: XM8 rocket subsystem 2x LAU-61 pods (19rds each = 38 total)
approximations: FFARLauncher / 38Rnd_FFAR is exact match for 2x LAU-61 19-rd pods

presets.name: Light Scout
presets.why: Minimalist escort: light FFAR load for responsiveness; common for MEU insertion escort

mountable.notes: Classname is DSHKM (all caps) — NOT DShKM or DShKM_veh
Classname is MK19 (all caps) — NOT Mk19 or Mk19_veh
Classname is AGS30 (no underscore) — NOT AGS_30
Used in BalanceInit BRDM-2 Igla conversion (addWeaponTurret). Requires 2Rnd_Igla twice.
Used in BalanceInit Pandur conversion. Heavy cannon — suitable only for armored vehicles.

knownGaps: L159_ACR and Mi24_D_CZ_ACR: ACR DLC classes absent from config dump — weapons/magazines unknown
Kh-25ML (AS-10 Karen): no A2 equivalent — Su-25 anti-armor preset uses FAB-250 as poor substitute
Vikhr ATGM (Su-39 real weapon): only exists on Ka-52 as VikhrLauncher/12Rnd_Vikhr_KA50 in A2
R-77 / AMRAAM BVR missile: no A2 equivalent — Su-34 escort preset uses R-73 WVR only
AIM-92 Stinger ATAS (Apache heli-mounted): not in A2 — Apache escort preset notes this
FAB-100 bomb: not in A2 — L-39 preset uses FAB-250 instead
ZU23 weapon class: top-level classname uncertain — appears in sub-modes, not confirmed as standalone CfgWeapons class
BTR40_TK_GUE_EP1: base BTR-40 may be unarmed — needs CfgVehicles verification
210Rnd_25mm_M242_APDS and _HEI: both have count=240 in config despite 210 in classname name
